description: CompositionYellow and blue hooded jacket for men made of 100% polyester, has drawstrings for the hood, long sleeves with ribbed, elasticated cuffs, branding printed on the left chest, full zippered placket, two zippered pockets on the side and mesh liningFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry on lowThe nike Windrunner was designed by Geoff Hollister in the Spring of 1978, inspired by his observations of Native American history. Created to combat the wind and the rain of the Pacific Northwest, this jacket is perfectly suited for the Indian monsoon. It's an all-season favourite, protecting you from the harsh city wind as you zoom through the city in your bike.
